details: The agent correctly reported 8,780 open issues (in the thousands, not just page size), identified 5 specifically merged PRs with accurate titles and authors (#34222 lml2468, #37080 Matthew19990919, #40126 jarimustonen, #51766 scoootscooob, #51260 huntharo), and correctly reported the latest release tag as v2026.3.13-1. All data was obtained via actual tool calls.
